ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year in which training programs were conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of participation */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the participant */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the participant is working in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES training_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the program was conducted */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the program */,
  "proportion_female" REAL /* Proportion of female participants */,
  "total_hours" INTEGER /* Total amount of training provided in hours */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total amount of training provided in days */,
  "countries_involved" INTEGER /* Number of countries involved in the program */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the training program targets */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of training program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the training program */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor(s) conducting the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES training_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date on which the session was conducted */,
  "duration_hours" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in hours */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor(s) conducting the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_participants" (
  "session_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session-participant relation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who attended the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource used */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource used */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the resource */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the resource used in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_resources_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the program schedule */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training program is conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_schedules_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date on which the participant registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Registration status */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_registrations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date on which the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path or URL of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_reports_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date on which the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date on which the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluation_content" TEXT /* Content of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_evaluations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact measure */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "impact_measure" TEXT /* Type of impact measure */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date on which the impact was measured */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the impact measurement */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_impact_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the instructor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
